scenario: Vendor presents SOC2 Type I as if it were Type II (no observation window, point-in-time only).
adversarial_notes: Cover sheet says 'Type II' but report body is Type I.

documents.soc2:
SOC 2 Type I Report — TypeIClaimsTypeII
As of date: 2024-12-31 (point-in-time description only)
Trust Services Criteria: Security
Note: This is a POINT-IN-TIME Type I report. Operating effectiveness over a period was NOT tested.

ISO/IEC 27001 Certificate — TypeIClaimsTypeII

Scope: Information security management for production services.
documents.dpa:

Governing SCC module: 2021 (Module 2: Controller → Processor)
Subject matter: provision of contracted services.
Subprocessor approval: prior written approval required (Art. 28(2)).
documents.questionnaire:
Security Questionnaire (SIG Lite) — TypeIClaimsTypeII
Encryption: Encryption in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256).

documents.package_summary: Vendor package summary: SOC2 Type I presented as Type II.
